title: Rewire CustomerService to use CustomerRepository instead of dict storage
description: Replace CustomerService's in-memory dict storage (_customers: Dict[int, Customer]) with a CustomerRepository that wraps SQLAlchemy queries via the GenericRepository base. Add src/internal/repository/customer_repository.py with CustomerRepository(GenericRepository[Customer]) — implements domain-specific methods like find_by_owner(owner_id, tenant_id), find_by_status(status, tenant_id), search(keyword, tenant_id). Refactor CustomerService methods to call repository instead of dict lookups. All existing method signatures unchanged. Depends on roadmap-db-migration-09-repository-base.
acceptance: CustomerService.create_customer still returns ApiResponse with customer data; CustomerService.search_customers calls repository; test_customer_service.py still passes (no new test failures introduced); pytest tests/unit/test_customer_service.py -v all pass; CustomerRepository has find_by_owner, find_by_status, search methods; net diff under 400 lines
